ogTitle: Gipsy Point vs Girgarre East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gipsy Point and Girgarre East.
heading: Gipsy Point vs Girgarre East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gipsy Point, Victoria and Girgarre East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Girgarre East has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Gipsy Point (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gipsy Point or Girgarre East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gipsy Point has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Girgarre East scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gipsy Point scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Girgarre East scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gipsy Point or Girgarre East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Girgarre East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
